response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires a director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 13-14 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms, no advanced degree in an AI field, and limited cloud-platform strategy or executive-level influence work. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP tooling at re:cinq, which is far below the bar for a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Community leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise required for the role
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director-level strategic leadership
No advanced degree in AI and limited cloud-platform strategy or strategic-customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC requirement
